output.code: import json, re, unicodedata, os, sys, math, textwrap, itertools, difflib, statistics

quran[0]

def strip_diacritics(s):
    return ''.join(ch for ch in unicodedata.normalize('NFD', s) if not unicodedata.combining(ch))

def normalize_ar(s):
    if s is None: return ''
    s = s.strip()
    # remove tatweel kashida
    s = s.replace('ـ', '')
    # unify hamza forms
    s = s.replace('أ','ا').replace('إ','ا').replace('آ','ا').replace('ؤ','و').replace('ئ','ي').replace('ة','ه')
    # remove diacritics
    s = strip_diacritics(s)
    # remove punctuation and brackets
    s = re.sub(r'[^\w\s]', ' ', s)
    # collapse spaces
    s = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', s)
    return s.strip().lower()

norm_err_full = normalize_ar("وَإِنَّ مِنْ شِيَعِهِمْ لَوَاحِدَةٌ يَهْدُونَ بِالْحَقِّ وَبَياَنَةً لَهُمْ")
norm_err_snip = normalize_ar("وَإِنَّ مِ...َةً لَهُمْ")
norm_err_full, norm_err_snip

def lcs_length(a, b):
    # We'll use DP O(n*m) small strings manageable
    n, m = len(a), len(b)
    dp = [0]*(m+1)
    for i in range(1,n+1):
        prev=0
        for j in range(1,m+1):
            temp = dp[j]
            if a[i-1]==b[j-1]:
                dp[j] = prev+1
            else:
                dp[j] = max(dp[j], dp[j-1])
            prev=temp
    return dp[m]

def similarity_metrics(a, b):
    # Normalize Arabic
    na, nb = normalize_ar(a), normalize_ar(b)
    # char LCS normalized by max length
    lcs = lcs_length(na, nb)
    lcs_norm = lcs / max(len(na), len(nb)) if max(len(na), len(nb))>0 else 0
    # token F1
    ta, tb = na.split(), nb.split()
    ca = set(ta); cb = set(tb)
    inter = ca & cb
    precision = len(inter)/len(ca) if ca else 0
    recall = len(inter)/len(cb) if cb else 0
    f1 = 2*precision*recall/(precision+recall) if (precision+recall)>0 else 0
    # SequenceMatcher ratio
    sm = difflib.SequenceMatcher(None, na, nb).ratio()
    return {'lcs_norm': lcs_norm, 'token_f1': f1, 'seqmatch': sm, 'len_a': len(na), 'len_b': len(nb), 'na': na, 'nb': nb}

err_full = "وَإِنَّ مِنْ شِيَعِهِمْ لَوَاحِدَةٌ يَهْدُونَ بِالْحَقِّ وَبَياَنَةً لَهُمْ"
